name_cn:
❤️ M44873
PALM SPRINGS Mini Backpack
Nicolas Ghesquière gives this backpack a style shift, turning a plain everyday item into a chic and charming city bag. This mini backpack, made of soft Monogram canvas, is petite and adorable, featuring a versatile strap for crossbody wear.
Detailed Features
17 x 22 x 10 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Soft calfskin trim
Adjustable shoulder straps
Nylon lining
Zippered front pocket
Handle: Single handle
